description: Posture Assertion signed by a key whose kid is not present in the Issuer Key Set; MUST be rejected with TM_INVALID_SIG or TM_ISSUER_UNKNOWN
note: This vector tests the key-discovery enforcement required by Section 9.2. The signature may be mathematically valid under some unrelated key, but the kid in the JWS header references a key not in the issuer's published IKS. A conforming verifier MUST fetch the IKS, fail to resolve the kid, and reject.

inputs.trust_mark_jws: <PLACEHOLDER: JWS with kid='test-es256-rogue' not present in IKS>
